That 1.2m swell with the onshore breeze suggests a day of battling chop rather than barrels.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 8.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
